verses.7: Wahum AAala ma yafAAaloona bialmumineena shuhoodun
verses.8: Wama naqamoo minhum illa an yuminoo biAllahi alAAazeezi alhameedi
verses.9: Allathee lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi waAllahu AAala kulli shayin shaheedun
verses.10: Inna allatheena fatanoo almumineena waalmuminati thumma lam yatooboo falahum AAathabu jahannama walahum AAathabu alhareeqi
verses.11: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati lahum jannatun tajree min tahtiha alanharu thalika alfawzu alkabeeru
